_doc: Component battery critic candidates (sweep_critiques schema). Route: python ufai_ingest.py component_consistency_candidates.json

candidates.title: .simple-card on hive is missing required .sc-label
candidates.should_be: the .simple-card primitive's contract is ['.sc-label', '.sc-hero'] (modal shape ['.sc-hero', '.sc-label', '.sc-sub', '.sc-tag']); this instance drifts — add the missing sub-part or justify the variant. (component battery, static-window; confirm via __UFAI.component('.simple-card')).

candidates.title: .simple-card renders in 2 different shapes across pages
candidates.should_be: the modal .simple-card shape is ['.sc-hero', '.sc-label', '.sc-sub', '.sc-tag'] (45 instances); 1 minority variant(s) exist e.g. on hive (delta ['.sc-label', '.sc-sub', '.sc-tag']). Converge to one shape (Jakob/consistency) or document the intentional variant.
